description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a short-sleeve t-shirt, long pants, and sneakers. He wears a baseball cap with a curved brim, and his facial hair includes a full beard and mustache. The figure's arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and his hands are open and relaxed. The clothing fits loosely, with the t-shirt sleeves ending above the elbows and the pants falling straight to the shoes. The shoes are low-top and appear to be designed for everyday walking. The overall appearance suggests a relaxed, approachable pedestrian suitable for city streets or parks.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a beard, baseball cap, t-shirt, pants, and sneakers, arms extended to the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, beard, baseball cap, t-shirt, pants, and sneakers with arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the cap, nose, beard, and the straight fall of the pants and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cap, t-shirt, pants, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the cap, beard, and the relaxed fit of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt, long pants, and a baseball cap
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short hair covered by a cap
